summary: Live-applied ADR 0325 on `codex/ws-0325-live-apply` by replacing the monolithic ADR metadata catalog with a compact root manifest plus range, concern, and status shards under `docs/adr/index/`, adding the committed reservation ledger and reservation-aware allocation/query tooling, registering the workstream in the shard-backed registry introduced by ADR 0326, and re-verifying the branch-local exact-main automation path through targeted tests, ownership validation, query-tool proofs, generated diagram refresh, and a passing `make pre-push-gate` replay whose only remote wrinkle was an Atlas connectivity fallback handled locally.

verification.check: Focused ADR discovery and registry regression slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_generate_adr_index.py tests/test_adr_query_tool.py tests/test_validation_lanes.py tests/test_workstream_registry.py` returned `14 passed`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-targeted-pytest-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Shard-backed registry and ADR generator drift checks
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --check` and `./scripts/run_python_with_packages.sh pyyaml -- scripts/generate_adr_index.py --check` both passed on the rebased tree with `361 ADRs indexed`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-workstream-registry-check-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-adr-index-check-r1.txt`.

`python3 scripts/adr_query_tool.py reservations` reported an empty ledger, `python3 scripts/adr_query_tool.py allocate --window-size 3` returned `0342-0344`, and `python3 scripts/adr_query_tool.py list --concern documentation --limit 5` returned shard-backed ADR metadata including implemented-version fields, preserved in the `...adr-query-*.json` evidence files.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` both passed after the active workstream shard, ADR generator outputs, and coordination diagram refresh were in place, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-workstream-surfaces-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-agent-standards-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Remote-first pre-push gate with unresolved-only local fallback
verification.observed: `make pre-push-gate` passed on the rebased branch-local exact-main tree; the remote build-server replay passed every selected content check except remote `atlas-lint`, then `scripts/run_gate_fallback.py` reran only that unresolved check locally and merged the passing result into `.local/validation-gate/last-run.json`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-pre-push-summary-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-pre-push-last-run-r1.json`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-gate-status-r1.json`.

notes: This is a branch-local live-apply receipt for a repo-only ADR; it intentionally leaves `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, the top-level `README.md` status summary, and `versions/stack.yaml` untouched until the exact-main integration step.

After the final workstream metadata was promoted to `live_applied`, `generated-docs` correctly reported `changelog.md` and `versions/stack.yaml` as pending canonical-truth updates; that is the expected handoff into the protected mainline release step, not an unresolved ADR 0325 implementation defect.

The release snapshot preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0325-release-status-r1.json` still reports unrelated historical `controller_dependency_gap` waiver debt, so the protected mainline cut must follow the existing lower-level release-helper precedent already used on `main` if the top-level release manager refuses again.
Exact-main integration should begin with one fresh `git fetch origin --prune` because `origin/main` may advance again before the protected surfaces are written and pushed.
